title: onagra biennis var. grandiflora
intro: Onagra biennis var. grandiflora, also known as large-flowered evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant in the wild mustard family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Onagra biennis var. grandiflora include reducing symptoms of anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting skin health due to its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). The plant can be prepared for consumption in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and support overall well-being.
